---
title: "Session Title"
subtitle: "Session Subtitle"
date: today
format: revealjs
---

# Section Title {.sdaia-dark background-gradient="linear-gradient(135deg, #1C355E, #00C9A7)"}

Subtitle or Context

## Agenda

- Item 1
- Item 2
- Item 3

## Slide Title

- Bullet point 1
- Bullet point 2
    - Sub-point A
    - Sub-point B

## Two Columns

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}
**Left Column**

- Point 1
- Point 2
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
**Right Column**

- Point 3
- Point 4
:::

::::

## Image Slide

![Caption Text](assets/placeholder.png)

## Quote Slide {.sdaia-dark background-color="#1C355E"}

> "This is a quote from a famous person or a key takeaway."

- Author Name

## Code Block

```python
def hello_world():
    print("Hello, World!")
```

## Callouts

::: {.callout-tip}
## Tip
This is a helpful tip.
:::

::: {.callout-important}
## Important
This is critical information.
:::
